Klasse ProjectModel

java.lang.Object
model.ProjectModel
public class ProjectModel extends Object
Manages the list of tasks for the project management tool.

This class serves as the Model in the MVC architecture. It utilizes PropertyChangeSupport to notify the View about data changes without maintaining a direct dependency on the View itself.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    private final PropertyChangeSupport
    pcs
    The support mechanism for managing event listeners and firing property changes.
    private ArrayList<Task>
    tasks
    The internal list of tasks managed by this model.

    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    ProjectModel()
    Creates a new project model initialized with an empty list of tasks.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • tasks

      private ArrayList<Task> tasks
      The internal list of tasks managed by this model.

    • pcs

      private final PropertyChangeSupport pcs
      The support mechanism for managing event listeners and firing property changes.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • ProjectModel

      public ProjectModel()
      Creates a new project model initialized with an empty list of tasks.

  • Methodendetails

    • setTasks

      public void setTasks(ArrayList<Task> tasks)
      Sets the entire list of tasks.

      This method is primarily used during the initial load from the data storage.

      Parameter:
      tasks - the list of tasks loaded from storage, not null

    • addTask

      public void addTask(Task task)
      Adds a task to the list, saves the state, and notifies listeners.

      The data is automatically saved to the persistent XML file, and a property change event is fired to update the view.

      Parameter:
      task - the task to be added, not null

    • getTasks

      public ArrayList<Task> getTasks()
      Gets a shallow copy of the current list of tasks.
      Gibt zurück:
      a new list containing the currently managed tasks, not null

    • addPropertyChangeListener

      public void addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Adds a property change listener to receive state change events.
      Parameter:
      listener - the listener to be added, not null

    • removeTaskByTitle

      public void removeTaskByTitle(String title)
      Removes a task from the list based on its exact title.

      If the task is successfully found and removed, the updated list is saved to the storage and listeners are notified about the structural change.

      Parameter:
      title - the title of the task to be removed, may be null

    • toggleTaskStatus

      public void toggleTaskStatus(String title)
      Toggles the status of a specific task between "Open" and "Done".

      If the task is successfully found, its status is inverted, the updated list is saved to persistent storage, and listeners are notified.

      Parameter:
      title - the exact title of the task to toggle, not null

    • forceUpdateAndSave

      public void forceUpdateAndSave()
      Forces an update in the view and saves the current data.

      This method is typically used when the internal properties of an existing task have changed (such as logged time) without altering the list structure itself.

    • findTaskByTitle

      public Task findTaskByTitle(String title)
      Finds a task in the managed list by its exact title.

      The search compares the titles in a case-insensitive manner after trimming whitespace.

      Parameter:
      title - the title to search for, not null
      Gibt zurück:
      the matching task, or null if no match is found

    • getFilteredTasks

      public ArrayList<Task> getFilteredTasks(String statusFilter, String assigneeFilter)
      Gets a filtered list of tasks based on status and assignee criteria.

      The status filter requires an exact match, whereas the assignee filter checks if the given string is contained within the task's assignees. Providing "All" for either parameter bypasses that specific filter.

      Parameter:
      statusFilter - the status to filter by, or "All" for no status filtering, not null
      assigneeFilter - the assignee name to filter by, or "All" for no assignee filtering, not null
      Gibt zurück:
      a new list containing only the tasks that match both filters, not null
